galleries.name: Reading & Literature
galleries.description: Books, literature, comprehension, and writing.
quotes: Every book is a doorway, and imagination is the key.
A story can take you farther than any road.
The more you read, the larger your world becomes.

galleries.name: Read Alouds
galleries.description: Stories and audiobooks to enjoy together or independently.
quotes: A story shared aloud becomes a memory shared together.
Listening closely is another way of learning to see.
Words come alive when a voice gives them wings.

galleries.name: Mathematics & Logic
galleries.description: Numbers, puzzles, problem-solving, and mathematical thinking. Arithmetic, algebra, geometry, statistics, probability, formal logic, and problem-solving.
quotes: Every puzzle becomes clearer one step at a time.
Patterns are the quiet language of the universe.
A difficult problem is an invitation to think differently.

galleries.name: Physical Sciences
galleries.description: Experiments, simulations, Physics, chemistry, astronomy, geology, meteorology, and the study of matter and energy.
quotes: Curiosity begins with a question and grows through discovery.
Look closely; the smallest detail may hold the biggest wonder.
Every experiment teaches us something, even when it surprises us.

galleries.name: History & Archaeology
galleries.description: People, places, documents, and stories from the past. Ancient civilizations, world history, local history, historical people, archaeology, and major events.
quotes: The past leaves clues for those willing to look.
Understanding yesterday helps us choose tomorrow wisely.
Every ordinary life is part of a larger story.

galleries.name: Geography
galleries.description: Maps, countries, cultures, and the world around us.
quotes: The world grows smaller when we learn how others live.
Every map is an invitation to explore.
A new place can teach us a new way to see.

galleries.name: Space
galleries.description: Planets, stars, missions, and the wider universe.
quotes: Wonder begins wherever the known world ends.
The night sky reminds us how much remains to discover.
Big questions often begin by looking up.

galleries.name: Nature & Animals
galleries.description: Birds, plants, outdoor discovery, ecosystems, climate, natural resources, and human interaction with the Earth.
quotes: Nature rewards the person who slows down enough to notice.
Small changes, given time, can shape an entire landscape.
There is always something new beneath an old tree.

galleries.name: Engineering
galleries.description: Design, build, invent, test, and improve. machines, inventions, architecture, design, and applied engineering.
quotes: Ideas become useful when we give them shape.
Build, test, adjust, and try again.
Every invention begins with someone imagining a better way.

galleries.name: Coding & Technology
galleries.description: Programming, computer skills, and digital creativity.
quotes: A large creation is often built one small instruction at a time.
Mistakes are clues that help us improve the design.
Code turns careful thinking into something others can use.

galleries.name: Languages
galleries.description: Learn new languages and explore communication.
quotes: Every language offers another window into the human world.
New words make room for new ideas.
Understanding grows when we learn how others express themselves.

galleries.name: Art
galleries.description: Drawing, museums, techniques, and creative expression.
quotes: Art begins when you notice something worth expressing.
There is no single right way to make something meaningful.
Your imagination deserves a place in the world.

galleries.name: Music
galleries.description: Music theory, sound, rhythm, and composition.
quotes: Music can say what ordinary words cannot.
A single note matters because of what surrounds it.
Listening is where music truly begins.

galleries.name: Typing
galleries.description: Build speed, accuracy, and keyboard confidence.
quotes: Confidence grows through patient practice.
Accuracy first; speed follows.
Every skill becomes easier through steady repetition.

galleries.name: Logic & Critical Thinking
galleries.description: Chess, reasoning, strategy, and brain challenges.
quotes: Clear thinking begins with careful questions.
A puzzle is a path that has not yet revealed itself.
Reasoning helps us separate what seems true from what is true.

galleries.name: Economics & Finance
galleries.description: Money, markets, budgeting, and financial literacy.
quotes: Small choices repeated over time can create lasting change.
Wise planning gives future possibilities room to grow.
Money is a tool; understanding helps us use it well.

galleries.name: Life Skills
galleries.description: Everyday knowledge, career skills, and practical learning.
quotes: Independence is built through many small acts of practice.
Useful knowledge becomes confidence in action.
Learning how to care for daily life is a form of wisdom.

galleries.name: Life Sciences & Health
galleries.description: Biology, ecology, medicine, anatomy, nutrition, psychology, exercise, and public health.
quotes: Serious study begins with the courage to remain curious.
Knowledge deepens when we connect ideas across subjects.
The goal of learning is not only to know more, but to understand better.

galleries.name: Educational Videos
galleries.description: Curated channels that make complex ideas understandable.
quotes: A good explanation can turn confusion into possibility.
Watch actively, pause thoughtfully, and follow your questions.
Seeing an idea in motion can help it settle in the mind.

galleries.name: Heart Studies
galleries.description: Thoughtful studies and resources for the heart and home.
quotes: A thoughtful life is built from what we choose to value.
Character grows through the choices no one else sees.
The heart learns through reflection, practice, and care.

galleries.name: Futurescape
galleries.description: A space for future-focused exploration and discovery.
quotes: The future is shaped by the questions we are brave enough to ask.
Imagination helps us prepare for possibilities that do not yet exist.
Tomorrow begins in the ideas we explore today.

resources.name: NASA STEM
resources.description: Space science activities, missions, and learning resources.

resources.name: Smithsonian Learning Lab
resources.description: Explore millions of Smithsonian resources and learning collections.

resources.name: PhET Interactive Simulations
resources.description: Interactive math and science simulations from the University of Colorado Boulder.

resources.name: Mystery Science
resources.description: Engaging science lessons and activities for children.

resources.name: CK-12 Science
resources.description: Free digital textbooks, simulations, and adaptive practice.

resources.name: Storyline Online
resources.description: Children's books read aloud by celebrated actors.

resources.name: Unite for Literacy
resources.description: A colorful digital library with narration in many languages.

resources.name: LibriVox
resources.description: Free public-domain audiobooks read by volunteers.

resources.name: San Diego Zoo Kids
resources.description: Animal facts, videos, stories, and activities.

resources.name: Monterey Bay Aquarium Live Cams
resources.description: Watch sea otters, jellyfish, sharks, and other ocean life live.

resources.name: Explore.org Live Nature Cams
resources.description: Live wildlife and nature cameras from around the world.

resources.name: NASA STEM
resources.description: Space science activities, missions, and learning resources.

resources.name: NASA Eyes
resources.description: Interactive 3D visualizations of planets, spacecraft, and Earth.

resources.name: ESA Kids
resources.description: Space news, games, and learning from the European Space Agency.

resources.name: iNaturalist
resources.description: Identify plants and animals and contribute to citizen science.

resources.name: Merlin Bird ID
resources.description: Identify birds by sight or sound with Cornell's free tools.

resources.name: Cornell Lab of Ornithology
resources.description: Bird science, live cams, identification, and learning resources.

resources.name: Tinkercad
resources.description: Create 3D designs, circuits, and beginner-friendly engineering projects.

resources.name: Math Learning Center Bridges
resources.description: Free math apps and manipulatives for visual problem-solving.

resources.name: CK-12 Engineering
resources.description: Free engineering concepts, lessons, and digital learning materials.

resources.name: Simple Joy Art
resources.description: Art lessons and creative projects.

resources.name: Libraries of Hope Rotation
resources.description: A rotating collection of literature and learning resources.

resources.name: Heart Studies Rotation
resources.description: A rotating collection of heart-centered studies.

siteSettings.title: Wonder Hall
siteSettings.tagline: Step inside. Your next adventure is waiting.
siteSettings.featuredDescription: Explore NASA resources, watch planets in motion, visit the ISS, and discover the wonders beyond Earth.
